My fiancé and I engaged Photizo Studio for our pre-wedding photoshoot. Through recommendation, we approached them. As the wedding season was in full swing, despite the heavily booked dates, I cannot thank enough Alhhadh and his team to fit us in and doing such a great job. I heard they covered a wedding at the same shoot location until 1AM the previous night and the team was ready for our shoot sharp at 5.30 AM the next morning. Alhhadh and Sanil captured our photos. Considering the proximity of our marriage date, they went above and beyond for their customers and delivered us the edited pics within 2 days after the shoot in spite of their tight schedule.

Main highlights from our experience with Photizo:

1. We felt at ease during the photoshoot as the Photizo team was very friendly and accommodating with our requests.
2. They did an excellent job in capturing the morning highlights. The entire team is very talented and worked well with each other. Kudos for the punctuality, patience and prompt reply on our needs
3. The team knew how to take natural angles that made the photos turn out very nice!
4. The final editing is absolutely stunning and not to say their package prices are really reasonable and affordable for the effort they put in. We received many compliments on our pre-wed shoot photos!
5. We like their attitude in experimenting and trying out new ideas and accepting customer feedback.

From start to finish - amazing service!
The professionalism and quality of work is greatly appreciated.
For sure, they deserve my feedbacks and recommendation!!!

What can we say? We are really lucky we have found you. You are an amazing photographer and wonderful person. Thank you so much for being part of our wedding and capturing these precious moments that we will never forget. We must say you have made everything so easy for us – before, during and after the wedding. You made us laugh, saw us cry (joy tears, of course :)) and captured every special moment during the wedding.
So grateful for the vivid photographs, panoramic video, and your expert guidance throughout the most important day in my son's life. You have been and will always be a great part of all our celebrations. Looking forward to many more such joyous ones.
All the best always.

We have been customers of the studio for several decades, anything from passport photo to school ID photos to portraits. Recently, my dad passed away and I needed a photo enlarged. I contacted them Monday morning and didn't need photo till Tues afternoon.  They delivered within 3-4 hours. They were in constant communication about the frame, size, frequently sending photo for approval.  Very please with the final product.

reviews.text:
We had the absolute pleasure of having Avinash as our wedding photographer.
From the very first meeting, he made us feel comfortable and confident.
He listened carefully to our ideas and shared his own creative suggestions.
On the wedding day, he arrived perfectly on time and was fully prepared.
His polite and calm nature made everyone feel relaxed in front of the camera.
Avinash managed every moment with so much professionalism and patience.
He captured every emotion beautifully — from laughter to tears of joy.
The pre-wedding shoot with him was an amazing and fun experience.
He guided us perfectly with poses and made sure we looked our best.
During the main events, he coordinated wonderfully with our families.
Even in busy or emotional moments, he stayed focused and smiling.
His entire team was equally professional, humble, and well-behaved.
The candid photos turned out simply magical and full of life.
He didn’t just click pictures — he captured memories that speak emotions.
The cinematic videos were beyond our expectations, truly like a movie.
Every frame shows his dedication and eye for detail.
He made sure every ritual, smile, and décor detail was covered perfectly.
We received all edited photos and videos right on time as promised.
The quality of editing and color tones was absolutely premium.
Our families and friends loved every photo and appreciated his work.
He handled everything from start to end without any stress for us.
We felt like he was part of our family throughout the celebrations.
If you’re looking for a polite, punctual, and talented photographer — Avinash is the one.
Thank you, Avinash, for making our wedding memories so special and everlasting.
Highly recommended for anyone who wants pure professionalism with a personal touch.
